pr.title: feat: resource access approvals - gate grid bookings, apply/approve/deny flow
pr.body:
Members must be explicitly approved per-resource before they can book. Adds the full approval lifecycle: member applies, admin approves/denies, grid enforces access.

## Backend

- **Migration `20260524000002`**: Two new `SECURITY DEFINER` RPCs:
  - `get_my_resource_approvals(p_club_id)` — caller's approval records for a club's resources
  - `list_club_resource_access_requests(p_club_id)` — admin-only; all approval records enriched with resource name + user identity

## Service (`club.service.ts`)

New interfaces: `Membership`, `ResourceAccessApproval`, `ResourceAccessRequest`

New methods: `getUserMembership`, `getMyResourceApprovals`, `applyForResourceAccess`, `listClubResourceAccessRequests`, `setResourceAccessStatus`

## Reservation Grid

Accepts `approvedResourceIds: Set<string>`. "open" buttons are only rendered for resources the user is approved for — unapproved columns are simply blank.

## Club Detail Page

Init now fetches membership + approvals in parallel alongside existing loads.

- **Resources/Stations section**: each row shows contextual status — `Approved` badge, `Pending approval` badge, or an "Apply for access" button (only if membership is approved)
- **Admin card (bottom)**: replaces the old inline Create Resource section with two `mat-card` panels:
  1. Create Resource form
  2. Resource Access Requests — lists all requests across all resources with Approve/Deny actions per row
pr.author: Copilot
